raw_title: Book Review: ‘Muskism,’ by Quinn Slobodian and Ben Tarnoff
book_title: ‘Muskism,’ by Quinn Slobodian and Ben Tarnoff
description: In a new book, Quinn Slobodian and Ben Tarnoff argue that Elon Musk’s disruptive approach to business is transforming both politics and the economy.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Into the Wood Chipper,’ by Nicholas Enrich
book_title: ‘Into the Wood Chipper,’ by Nicholas Enrich
description: Nicholas Enrich’s tell-all memoir, “Into the Wood Chipper,” has advice for others caught between their conscience and their government.
